nasb.text: but their plot became known to Saul. They were also watching the gates day and night so that they might put him to death;

esv.text: but their plot became known to Saul. They were watching the gates day and night in order to kill him,

cnv.text: 但他們的計謀給掃羅知道了。他們就在各城門日夜把守，要殺掉他。

ccb.text: 他们昼夜在城门守候，伺机下手，但这阴谋被扫罗知道了。

csbs.text: 但他们的阴谋却被扫罗知道了。于是他们就日夜严守着各城门，要杀掉他。
